news.t: Global X Launches PureCap[SM] Product Suite to Provide Uncapped Sector ETF Exposure

holdings.infoBox: GXPT is an equity ETF with a total of 88 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 19.99%, Apple at 18.34%, Microsoft at 11.60%, Broadcom at 7.08%, and Micron Technology at 4.79%.

overview.description: The Global X PureCap MSCI Information Technology ETF (GXPT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Information Technology index. The fund selects US companies involved in the Information Technology sector. Holdings are weighted purely by market capitalization without maximum weight constraints. GXPT was launched on Jul 22, 2025 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X Launches PureCap[SM] Product Suite to Provide Uncapped Sector ETF Exposure
data.text: The new suite of ETFs seeks to deliver true market capitalization exposure across five key sectors, addressing rising market concentration trends NEW YORK , July 23, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X Mana...
